properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My Bible and I My Bible and I What a wonderful treasure God gave without measure We are travelling together My Bible and I

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My Jesus and I My Jesus and I What a wonderful Saviour God gave without measure We are travelling together My Jesus and I

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Holy Spirit and I Holy Spirit and I What a wonderful comforter God gave without measure We are travelling together Holy Spirit and I

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My Sister and I My Sister and I What a wonderful treasure God gave without measure We are travelling together My Sister and I.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: My Brother and I My Brother and I What a wonderful treasure God gave without measure We are travelling together My Brother and I.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: My Prophet and I My Prophet and I What a wonderful treasure God gave without measure We are travelling together My Prophet and I.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: My Pastor and I My Pastor and I What a wonderful treasure God gave without measure We are travelling together My Pastor and I.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: My Deacon and I My Deacon and I What a wonderful treasure God gave without measure We are travelling together My Deacon and I.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: My Trustee and I My Trustee and I What a wonderful treasure God gave without measure We are travelling together My Trustee and I.
